---
title: "Trainings"
---

I am an RStudio certified tidyverse instructor.
I enjoy teaching data analysis skills using R.
Here are some selected trainings, workshops, and courses I have taught.

::: {.training-card}
::: {.training-card-year}
2026
:::
::: {.training-card-title}
[Elements of Machine Learning](https://ayushbipinpatel.github.io/APU-Bhopal-DDD-jan2026-intor-statistical-learning/)
:::
::: {.training-card-venue}
Azim Premji University, Bhopal
:::
::: {.training-card-desc}
An introductory course for undergraduate students covering parametric and non-parametric machine learning methods.
:::
:::

::: {.training-card}
::: {.training-card-year}
2025
:::
::: {.training-card-title}
[Web Scraping with R](https://ayushbipinpatel.github.io/APU-blore-workshop-web-scraping/)
:::
::: {.training-card-venue}
Azim Premji University, Bengaluru
:::
::: {.training-card-desc}
An applied workshop for postgraduate students on extracting data from static and dynamic websites.
:::
:::

::: {.training-card}
::: {.training-card-year}
2025
:::
::: {.training-card-title}
[Designing and Programming Survey Forms](https://ayushbipinpatel.github.io/APU-DDD-summer-school-2025/)
:::
::: {.training-card-venue}
Azim Premji University, Bengaluru
:::
::: {.training-card-desc}
Applied training for undergraduate students to use SurveyCTO to design and program survey forms.
:::
:::

::: {.training-card}
::: {.training-card-year}
2024
:::
::: {.training-card-title}
[Data Visualization — A tour of favourite hits](https://ayushbipinpatel.github.io/Data-Viz-at-Artha/#/title-slide)
:::
::: {.training-card-venue}
Artha Global
:::
::: {.training-card-desc}
A talk on good practices, taste, and common mistakes in data visualization.
:::
:::

::: {.training-card}
::: {.training-card-year}
2023
:::
::: {.training-card-title}
[Business Analytics](https://ayushbipinpatel.github.io/GIPE-Business-Analytics/)
:::
::: {.training-card-venue}
Gokhale Institute of Politics and Economics
:::
::: {.training-card-desc}
A course for postgraduate students covering intro to programming, literate programming, data visualization, regression, and classification methods.
:::
:::

::: {.training-card}
::: {.training-card-year}
2023
:::
::: {.training-card-title}
[Advanced Analytics with R](https://ayushbipinpatel.github.io/GIPE-UG-Advanced-Analytics-with-R/)
:::
::: {.training-card-venue}
Gokhale Institute of Politics and Economics
:::
::: {.training-card-desc}
A course for undergraduate students covering regression, classification, resampling methods, regularization, and multiple testing.
:::
:::

::: {.training-card}
::: {.training-card-year}
2022
:::
::: {.training-card-title}
[R for Data Analysis](https://ayushbipinpatel.github.io/R-for-Data-Analysis/)
:::
::: {.training-card-venue}
Juspay
:::
::: {.training-card-desc}
A course for employees ranging from engineers to product managers, covering R fundamentals, functional programming, literate programming, and RShiny.
:::
:::

::: {.training-card}
::: {.training-card-year}
2022
:::
::: {.training-card-title}
[Data Visualization](https://ayushbipinpatel.github.io/iisa-2022-viz-workshop/)
:::
::: {.training-card-venue}
International Indian Statistical Association Conference, IISc Bengaluru
:::
::: {.training-card-desc}
A workshop on data visualization using the grammar of graphics via {ggplot2}.
:::
:::

::: {.training-card}
::: {.training-card-year}
2022
:::
::: {.training-card-title}
[Parameterized Reporting with R](https://ayushbipinpatel.github.io/ideal-chainsaw-purrr/)
:::
::: {.training-card-venue}
RLadies Bengaluru
:::
::: {.training-card-desc}
A talk on using Quarto or R Markdown with {purrr} to generate parameterized reports.
:::
:::
